title: absolutely no explosion particles
description: This resource pack removes end crystal explosion particles to improve visibility, reduce lag, and boost FPS in Minecraft. Perfect for Crystal PvP, this pack clears visual clutter so you can see your opponent, crystals, and pearls more clearly during fights
body:
This resource pack removes end crystal explosion particles to improve visibility, reduce lag, and boost FPS in Minecraft. Perfect for Crystal PvP, this pack clears visual clutter so you can see your opponent, crystals, and pearls more clearly during fights good for pvp.

https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31ee743ef8edd0ba8306778c4e5f28ae31032e9c.gif

It also helps during TNT mining by removing explosion particles that block your screen.

Features

Removes end crystal explosion particles
Improves visibility in Crystal PvP
Reduces lag and increases FPS
Clears explosion particle clutter
Useful for PvP and TNT mining
Works seamlessly with most other packs!
